description: The UK Medical Heritage Library brings together books, pamphlets, reports and journals from 10 research libraries in the UK, from the 16th to the 20th century. This initiative was launched in 2015, initially part-funded by Jisc and Wellcome Collection with a focus on 19th century monographs, and drawing from 10 research libraries in the UK.  Over the past 10 years Wellcome has continued to add its own collections, including early printed books, patents, grey literature and journals in addition to books published up to 1914.  All items included in this collection are also accessible via the Wellcome Collection library catalogue .  UK Medical Heritage Library contributors include: King's College London London School of Hygiene & Tropical Medicine Royal College of Physicians of London Royal College of Physicians of Edinburgh Royal College of Surgeons of England University of Bristol UCL (University College London) University of Glasgow University of Leeds Wellcome Library
title: UK Medical Heritage Library
